description_long: This modern bungalow features a single-story main structure with a partial second-story section, flat and gable roof elements, and expansive floor-to-ceiling windows along the front facade. The exterior combines light-colored walls with dark roofing, and the property is surrounded by a manicured lawn, several trees, and a paved driveway. A prominent feature is the backyard swimming pool, bordered by a tiled patio and outdoor seating area. The front of the house is defined by a long row of glass doors and windows, providing ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The side and rear elevations reveal a mix of solid wall sections and additional windows, with the second story offering a balcony overlooking the pool. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection to the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern bungalow with a mix of flat and gable roofs, large glass windows, a backyard pool, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the long glass facade, pool, patio, and main entrance with surrounding greenery.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the gable roof, solid wall sections, and the pool area to the left.
description_view_2: Street-facing view with driveway, garage, and a clear view of the second-story balcony and main lawn.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the flat-roofed second story, balcony, and the pool area with patio and trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped front-facing windows
